about_figcaption: Sally - Computer Science student & Acoustics expert
about_p1: Hello, my name is Sally and this is my portfolio, where I showcase my projects, experiences, and a little bit about myself. Have fun exploring! I am 34 years old and studying Computer Science distance learning remotely. I have been working in the field of acoustics for the last 15 years. For the past nine years, I have been leading various teams in Germany in the field of hearing and assistive devices.
about_p2_text: To learn more about my journey, visit my
blog_1_p1: Finally, the time has come: my office is fully wallpapered and painted. There’s no comparison to how it looked before. The old walls look completely different now!
blog_1_p2: It took a while, but it was definitely worth it. Now I can finally focus on my work again instead of sitting in a cluttered room.
blog_1_p3: I’m really looking forward to using the new office and hope it helps me be more productive.
blog_1_p4: Now, all that’s missing is the furniture... but I’m calling it a day for now!
blog_2_p1: Our new family member has finally settled in! Marla seems to feel quite comfortable in her new home. We spent the afternoon with cuddles and games.
blog_2_p2: In the end, her favorite spot was the bag from our last walk. Hard to believe how much life with a pet enriches us. It's so nice to have her around and I'm looking forward to many more shared days!
blog_3_p1: My sister was so kind to bake a wonderful and super delicious cake for my birthday. Thank you for the beautiful day, the great gifts and especially for thinking of me! It's so nice to be surrounded by loved ones and I'm grateful for each and every one of them.
blog_3_p2: I'm looking forward to the next year and hope it will be just as nice as this year!

gh_p1_desc: A weather dashboard in a vintage style, retrieving current weather data through its own Node.js backend.
gh_p1_f1: Real-time weather data: Fetching temperature, wind speed and humidity via OpenWeatherMap API.
gh_p1_f2: Secure backend: Utilizing a Node.js/Express proxy server to protect API keys.
gh_p1_f3: Responsive: Optimized for desktop and mobile devices.
gh_p1_link: Weather Dashboard on GitHub (opens in new tab)
gh_p2_alt: Image of the Book Tracker website
gh_p2_desc: A personal, simple application to track your reading progress.
gh_p2_f1: Reading list management: Adding, editing and deleting books.
gh_p2_f2: Analysis of statistics: Genres, favorite author, number of read books and more.
gh_p2_t3: Extensibility for additional features and database integration
gh_p2_link: Book Tracker on GitHub (opens in new tab)
gh_p3_desc: A project work for developing a quiz application for the IU Quiz Academy.
gh_p3_f1: Management of quiz questions and answers for self-study
gh_p3_link: IU Quiz Academy on GitHub (opens in new tab)

tr_p1_alt: The Cliffs of Moher in Ireland during daylight
tr_p1_cap: Irish Landscape - Cliffs by the Sea
tr_p1_desc: Welcome to the Cliffs of Moher! The breathtaking nature in Ireland has captivated us all. The cliffs by the sea are truly impressive and offer a fantastic view over the water. We enjoyed the fresh sea air and let the beauty of the landscape sink in. It was an unforgettable experience that we will always remember. Hard to believe, but some people will do anything for a good photo. Climbing down the slopes is life-threatening and not worth any picture in the world. There is plenty to marvel at as it is. Rarely has a landscape impressed me this much.
tr_p2_h2: Denmark - We Had a Nice Time!
tr_p2_desc: Our visit to Denmark was truly wonderful! The beautiful landscape and the friendly locals left a great impression on us. We spent a lot of time at the harbor and discovered the local culture. The tranquility really helped us to finally wind down. What was both pleasant and unfamiliar at the same time? The absolute silence. No vehicle noise. No noise from any machinery. We would love to come back.
tr_p3_desc: Instead of flying again, we decided to spend our time in Germany. The natural beauty and the quiet atmosphere have greatly impressed us. We spent a lot of time in nature. Finally, I could visit the Partnachklamm, which has been on my list for a long time. The photo can hardly capture how impressive the gorge really is. Whoever gets the chance should definitely visit it. It goes to show that there are incredibly beautiful places right here in Germany as well.
